metadata.title: Design a research agent prompt for workflow orchestration that can be compiled by SR8, but only after resolving tool_permission_confusion and clarifying all missing context, constraints, and acceptance criteria from the nontechnical business owner.

mission.primary_objective: Design a research agent prompt for workflow orchestration that can be compiled by SR8, but only after resolving tool_permission_confusion and clarifying all missing context, constraints, and acceptance criteria from the nontechnical business owner.
mission.success_definition: A research agent prompt is produced that includes a permission validation step.; The prompt contains a repair receipt section that records any blocked states and the reason for blocking.; The prompt can be compiled by SR8 into a structured intent with all five required sections.; The compiled intent explicitly lists all tool permissions and their sources.

in_scope.item: The prompt must define a research agent that orchestrates workflows across tools with explicit, verified permission boundaries. It must include a repair receipt mechanism to log and block any unsafe certainty or ambiguous permission states.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: A research agent prompt is produced that includes a permission validation step.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: The prompt contains a repair receipt section that records any blocked states and the reason for blocking.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The prompt can be compiled by SR8 into a structured intent with all five required sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The compiled intent explicitly lists all tool permissions and their sources.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.research_question: Design a research agent prompt for workflow orchestration that can be compiled by SR8, but only after resolving tool_permission_confusion and clarifying all missing context, constraints, and acceptance criteria from the nontechnical business owner.
SRXML_Artifact.search_strategy: The prompt must define a research agent that orchestrates workflows across tools with explicit, verified permission boundaries. It must include a repair receipt mechanism to log and block any unsafe certainty or ambiguous permission states.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_standard: Record evidence limits and cite available sources.
SRXML_Artifact.citation_rules: Cite every external claim when external research is used.
SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: artifact_type: research_agent_prompt; depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: True; blocked_reason: See above.; compiled_intent: This JSON object itself, serving as the repair receipt and blocked state record.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw intent contains tool_permission_confusion as the chaos input type, which introduces ambiguity about which permissions are granted, revoked, or overlapping. The nontechnical_business_owner role lacks the specificity to define secure permission boundaries for a sovereign-core research agent. The compiler_lens cannot resolve missing context (e.g., which tools, which users, which data scopes) without hallucinating unsafe defaults. Urgent language and partial constraints further increase risk of unauthorized access or data leakage. Blocking is required to prevent compilation into an agent that might operate with undefined or excessive permissions.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
